judgment.summary: High-growth cloud security firm with strong revenue expansion and positive free cash flow, but currently unprofitable on a GAAP basis.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 12.6%; next earnings date is 2026-05-26.
positives: Revenue growth 25.9% YoY — indicates strong market adoption.
Free cash flow $1.02B TTM — positive cash generation supports operations.
Forward P/E 37.02x — reflects high growth expectations.
Analyst consensus is strong buy with a mean target of $223.39.
negatives: Operating margin -6.2% and Profit margin -2.3% — the company is not yet GAAP profitable.
Return on equity -3.6% and Return on assets -1.4% — negative returns highlight unprofitability.
Debt/Equity 85.00 — leverage is notable, though offset by substantial cash.

news.paragraph: With no recent headlines to guide the way, Zscaler's options traders will be focused on the upcoming earnings report scheduled for May 26th. The company recently beat Q1 EPS estimates, but the market will be looking for signs of continued growth and a path to profitability. The stock's performance will likely hinge on management's commentary regarding customer acquisition and expansion within its cybersecurity offerings.

examples.body: $CRWD $PANW $ZS $S $BB guys so crwd is negative today. Zeeacalar is negative. Blackberry is actually carrying CIBR up today. 😂
